name: Lemony Greek Beef and Vegetables
method: Cut and dispose of the bok choy root edge.
Chop the leaves thinly sliced. Break into 1-inch stalks. Now put aside.
Heat beef on moderate heat in a large pan until no longer pink,
Cover and set it aside from the skillet.
Heat the oil over moderate to high flame in the same pan.
Insert bok choy stalks and vegetables; continue cooking until crisp-
Boost heat to high; stir in cloves, bok choy leaf, and ¼ cup liquor.
Heat, stirring, until the leaves wilt, five minutes, to loosen the
Incorporate ground beef, rice, oregano, salts, and ample residual wine
Stir in the juice from the lemon; scatter with the Parmesan
